criteriaResults.criterion: Settings page renders at /settings route
criteriaResults.evidence: Route configured in App.tsx, page renders with data-testid, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Profile section with heading and current avatar display
criteriaResults.evidence: ProfileSection component renders heading and Avatar with user name, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Name input field (editable) with current value
criteriaResults.evidence: Name input enabled with value 'Sarah Chen', onChange handler updates state, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Email input field (read-only/disabled)
criteriaResults.evidence: Email input has disabled prop, helper text 'Email cannot be changed', E2E test verified toBeDisabled()

criteriaResults.criterion: Change Avatar button shows Coming soon! toast on click
criteriaResults.evidence: Button onClick shows toast 'Coming soon!' with type 'info', E2E test verified toast appears

criteriaResults.criterion: Notifications section with heading
criteriaResults.evidence: NotificationsSection renders with h2 heading 'Notifications', proper ARIA attributes, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Three toggle switches: Email, Push, Slack notifications
criteriaResults.evidence: NOTIFICATION_TOGGLES array defines all three types with Toggle components, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Toggles show current on/off state visually
criteriaResults.evidence: Toggle component changes bg color and knob position, aria-checked attribute, E2E test verified state changes

criteriaResults.criterion: Default: Email on, Push on, Slack off
criteriaResults.evidence: DEFAULT_NOTIFICATIONS defines correct defaults, E2E test verified aria-checked values match

criteriaResults.criterion: Appearance section with heading
criteriaResults.evidence: AppearanceSection renders with h2 heading 'Appearance', proper ARIA attributes, E2E test passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Theme selector: Light, Dark, System options (radio or segmented)
criteriaResults.evidence: THEME_CHOICES array with three radio options, proper icons and labels, E2E test verified all visible

criteriaResults.criterion: System option follows OS prefers-color-scheme
criteriaResults.evidence: Theme selector integrates with ThemeContext which handles system preference, existing E2E test in test-task-7.1.spec.ts passed

criteriaResults.criterion: Accent color picker with 5 swatches: blue, purple, green, orange, pink
criteriaResults.evidence: ACCENT_SWATCHES array defines all 5 colors with proper styling, E2E test verified all visible and selectable

criteriaResults.criterion: Selected accent color applies to primary buttons and accents app-wide
criteriaResults.evidence: applyAccentColor sets CSS custom properties on document root, useEffect applies on change, live preview works

criteriaResults.criterion: Save Changes button at bottom of page
criteriaResults.evidence: Button rendered at bottom with right alignment, data-testid attribute, E2E test verified visibility

criteriaResults.criterion: Save button shows brief loading state on click
criteriaResults.evidence: isSaving state with 600ms delay, Button receives isLoading prop, aria-busy attribute, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Success toast appears: Settings saved!
criteriaResults.evidence: showToast called with 'Settings saved!' message, E2E test verified toast appears after save

criteriaResults.criterion: All settings sections save together on Save click
criteriaResults.evidence: handleSave callback persists profile, notifications, and accent color together, E2E test verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Settings persist to localStorage and survive page refresh/browser restart
criteriaResults.evidence: useLocalStorage hooks for all three settings, E2E test verified persistence after page reload

criteriaResults.criterion: Initial values load from localStorage or use defaults
criteriaResults.evidence: useLocalStorage initializes from storage or defaults, DEFAULT_* constants defined, E2E test verified defaults

criteriaResults.criterion: Required Check - Smoke: App loads without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: All smoke tests passed, no console errors, Settings page loads cleanly

e2eResults.notes: 8 failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts are pre-existing (documented in Task 15 & 16 reports), not caused by Task 17. Same scenarios covered and passing in test-task-7.1.spec.ts.

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Implementation follows project patterns with proper TypeScript types, component isolation, useLocalStorage hook for persistence, batched saves with draft state pattern, live accent color preview, and comprehensive E2E test coverage. All 9 new E2E tests pass. No regressions introduced. Settings page properly integrates with existing ThemeContext and ToastContext. Production-ready with excellent UX and accessibility.
